title: backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
author: Nabsku

findings.description: Combined condition !IsKubernetesResourceAPIPath || !IsAuthBypassURL is correct but non-obvious. A brief comment explaining why both conditions are needed would help future readers.
kubernetesAPIPathIndex correctly handles both direct and proxied path forms, removing duplicated logic from GetAPIGroup and ExtractNamespace.
New TestIsKubernetesResourceAPIPath table-driven test covers direct, proxied, and non-API paths comprehensively.
New TestCacheMiddleware_BypassesNonKubernetesAPIPaths integration test confirms end-to-end bypass for /healthz and /readyz.
